title: Rage in Heaven
director: W.S. Van Dyke, Robert B. Sinclair, Richard Thorpe
writer: Christopher Isherwood, Robert Thoeren, James Hilton
actors: Robert Montgomery, Ingrid Bergman, George Sanders
plot: Robert Montgomery and George Sanders team up to play against type in this probing psychological thriller that features Ingrid Bergman as the object of their obsessions.
